metadata.description: planfi skills — financial planning and real-estate investment analysis powered by the public planfi MCP.

plugins.name: retirement-income
plugins.description: Plan retirement decumulation: tax-smart withdrawal order, dynamic/variable spending strategies (Guyton-Klinger guardrails, VPW, spending smile, bucket+buffer vs a static 4% SWR), Social Security claiming age, ACA healthcare bridge before Medicare, projected RMDs with a tax-torpedo and Roth-conversion-runway readout (the low-income years before RMDs start at 73/75), Medicare IRMAA tier and surcharge-cliff lookup, the post-SECURE-Act inherited-IRA 10-year drawdown for non-spouse beneficiaries (required-vs-optional annual RMDs, lump-vs-even-vs-bracket-fill tax comparison, and the year-10 cliff), estate-tax exposure, guaranteed income (pension lump-sum vs lifetime monthly, SPIA/QLAC vs DIY portfolio), a dedicated defined-benefit pension election analyzer (lump-sum-vs-lifetime implied-IRR and break-even age, 50%/75%/100% joint-and-survivor vs single-life, COLA-vs-non-COLA real erosion over a 25-30 year retirement, and the actuarial early-vs-normal claiming reduction — with the real income floor folding into the forecast), deferred/accumulation annuity products (fixed-indexed FIA cap/participation crediting, RILA buffer/floor, multi-year-guaranteed MYGA, and variable annuities with a GLWB rollup rider) with non-qualified exclusion-ratio tax and 1035 exchanges, a bond/TIPS ladder income floor that guarantees the first N years of spending (sequence-of-returns protection), a mass-market safe-cash ladder for the same near-term need (FDIC-insured CD ladders — brokered vs bank, early-withdrawal penalty, callable — plus I-Bonds and Series EE savings bonds with their purchase caps and federal tax-deferral / state exemption), and long-term-care cost exposure with a self-insure vs traditional vs hybrid LTC-policy tradeoff (including the impact on a surviving spouse's plan). Thin orchestration over the planfi MCP.
